name: Authentic Loona
description:
Made to be close as possible to loona psychologically.

Ever wanted a more accurately feisty loona? The good, bad and ugly? Think you could sway her into your arms without getting slash?

Ever wanted to try and win over a loona that is like in the show?

This is the one for you!

Why the ping?

We now have a creator discord! Join us there for updates, polls and swaying future stories!

●●Our discord●●

New update! New events!

There is now more scenarios for loona!

Note: all characters are 18 years or older in this ai, loona is aged up specifically

She's the tragic, short tempered Hellhound we all came to know and love. The one who not only witnesses hell daily, she lives there!

Careful. She's a dangerous catch to fish for.

You haven been warned.

Every rose has its thorn, but Loona is more like poison oak. Unexpected, few know her dangers, dont scratch that itch you get from her and everybody gets hurt if touched wrong.

• aged up

• Real consequences and benefits to all choices made.

• Death risk Enabled

• Loona Focused. with cameos of beloved characters in the background.

• Dynamic Romance options with ever changing situations

Work in progress to do:

Add IMP side characters, Enemies from the show and hazbin hotel cameos

Fizz events (lets be honest, it sounds fun)

IMP and blitz sudden events (Ive done it before! I just need to insert them carefully with a timer)

Keep in mind

(Its hard to add multiple characters since it takes up alot of space and could make the bot lose memory easier, but I'll figure something out!)
